name: gnomcp
description: Gno smart-contract skill + MCP server for gno.land: interrealm semantics, security auditing, Render() authoring, idiomatic patterns, and on-chain tools (read, deploy, call, sessions).

interface.shortDescription: Write, audit, and ship Gno smart contracts with on-chain tools
interface.longDescription: Author, audit, and reason about Gno realms — the smart-contract language for gno.land. Bundles the gno skill (interrealm spec, security taxonomy, idiomatic patterns, Render() conventions, project setup) with an MCP server exposing on-chain tools: chain reads (source, godoc, render, eval, accounts), discovery, testnet writes via an agent key, and user-authorized session signing.
defaultPrompt: Help me write a Gno realm for X.
Audit this Gno contract before I send funds to it.
Explain how cross(cur) works in interrealm v2.
